mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalLicenses, COUNT( CASE WHEN status = 'ACTIVE' AND expire_date >= NOW() THEN 1 END) AS activeLicenses, COUNT( CASE WHEN status = 'ACTIVE' AND expire_date >= NOW() AND expire_date < NOW() + INTERVAL '30 days' THEN 1 END) AS expiringSoonLicenses FROM license

SELECT LICENSE_KEY AS licenseKey, TYPE AS licenseType, LICENSE_COUNT AS licenseCount, STATUS AS licenseStatus, EXPIRE_DATE AS expireDate FROM LICENSE WHERE CUST_NO=#{custNo} ORDER BY EXPIRE_DATE DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT TYPE AS licenseType, COUNT(*) AS count FROM LICENSE WHERE TYPE IN ('STANDARD', 'PRO', 'ENTERPRISE') GROUP BY TYPE
